why.title: Kungani bantfu bashintjela ku Chatforia
why.subtitle: I-Chatforia ikunika inombolo yelucingo mbamba, lihumusho lelihlakaniphile, kanye nendlela lecacile yekuhamba ngaphandle kwesikhangiso uma sewukulungele.

textnow.title: I-Chatforia vs Umbhalo Nyalo
textnow.body: Tikhangiso letilula ku-Free, kutfutfukiswa kwe-Plus lokulula uma sewukulungele, kanye nemathuluzi e-Premium i-TextNow ayiniketi.

voice.title: I-Chatforia vs Livi laGoogle
voice.body: I-app yesimanje, umklamo wekucala wemhlaba wonkhe, kanye nekuhumusha lokwakhelwe ngaphakathi esikhundleni sekudlulisela lucingo lwesikolwa lesidzala.

messengers.title: I-Chatforia vs tinhlelo tekusebenta tekucoca
messengers.body: Bhala tinombolo telucingo mbamba — hhayi nje labanye basebentisi be-app — nge-AI kanye nesimo lesakhiwe. Kuhle kakhulu nangabe uvela kuma-app lafana ne-TextFree nobe i-TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Kucatsanisa lokusekelwe elwatini lolutfolakala emmangweni futsi kungashintja ngekuhamba kwesikhatsi. Letinye tinhlelo tekusebenta tekubhalela mahhala njenge-TextFree nobe i-TextMe tivame kufana ne-TextNow.

free.q: Ngabe luhlelo lwaMahhala lumahhala mbamba yini?
free.a: Yebo. Luhlelo lwaMahhala lufaka ekhatsi inombolo ye-Chatforia, kushayela, kanye nemilayeto lenetikhangiso. Ungahlala ku-Free sikhatsi lesidze njengobe utsandza, nobe utfutfukise kute ususe tikhangiso bese uvula letinye tintfo.

plusPremium.q: Yini umehluko emkhatsini we Plus ne Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus kususa tikhangiso futsi kwandzisa umlandvo wemlayeto wakho — ulungele kusetjentiswa kwamalanga onkhe. I-Premium yengeta kwenta ngekwemvelo lokungetiwe, emathulusi e-AI ekubhalela kabusha netimphendvulo, kanye nekwesekelwa lokubalulekile kwebasebentisi labasindzako.

esim.a: I-Chatforia Mobile isebentisa kuhlanganiswa kwe-eSIM yemhlaba wonkhe. Kutfolakala kuya ngelive lakho kanye nedivayisi yakho. Utawubona tintfo letisekelwako ngesikhatsi sekusebenta ngaphakatsi kwe-app.

cancel.q: Ngingakhansela nobe ngishintje tinhlelo nobe nini?
cancel.a: Yebo. Ungaphatsa nobe ukhansele kubhalisa kwakho kusuka ekhasini lekukhokha ku-app. Tingucuko ticala kusebenta ekupheleni kwesikhatsi sakho sekukhokha lesikhona nyalo.

family.a: Emaphakethe emndenini adala lidamu lemininingwane leyabelwana ngalo kuwo onkhe ema-akhawunti lamanyenti eChatforia. Umuntfu munye uyakhokha imali, futsi ungamema nobe ususe emalunga bese ubeka imikhawulo kumuntfu ngamunye.

randomChat.setAge: Setha libanga lakho leminyaka ku-Profile → Iminyaka & Ingcoco Lengahleliwe kute ihambisane nebantfu.

Kuze uhambisane nebantfu (hhayi nje iRiaBot), setha ibhendi yakho yeminyaka ku Tilungiselelo → Iminyaka & Ingcoco Lengahleliwe.

forgotPassword.title: Ukhohliwe iphasiwedi
forgotPassword.helper: Faka i-imeyili loyisebentisile kwenta i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia bese sikutfumelela sixhumanisi lesiphephile sekusetha kabusha iphasiwedi yakho.
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Ucelwa kutsi ufake likheli le-imeyili lelisebentako.
forgotPassword.genericError: Ayikhoni kusebenta sicelo. Ngicela uphindze uzame ngemuva kwesikhashana.
forgotPassword.sentHelper: Uma ngabe i-akhawunti ikhona ngaleyo-imeyili, sitfumele sixhumanisi sekusetha kabusha iphasiwedi. Kungase kutsatse imizuzu lembalwa kutsi ufike. Ciniseka kutsi uhlola ifolda yakho ye-spam nobe yekupromotha.

resetPassword.strongPasswordHint: Khetsa iphasiwedi lecinile longayisebentisi kulenye indzawo.

account.q: Ngingayidala njani nobe ngiyibuyisele njani i-akhawunti yami?
account.a: Landa i-app nobe usebentise iwebhu, thepha “Dala i-akhawunti”, cinisekisa i-imeyili/lucingo lwakho. Kuze ululame, sebentisa “Ukhohlwe iphasiwedi”.

privacy.q: Ingabe imilayeto ibhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni?
privacy.a: Yebo. Imilayeto kanye netingcingo kubhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni ngekuzenzakalela. Nguwe kanye nememukeli kuphela longatifundza.

translate.a: Nika emandla “Kuhumusha ngekuzenzakalela” ku- Settings → Kubukeka Nelulwimi. Sihumusha kudivayisi lapho kusekelwa khona, ngaphandle kwaloko nge-APIs lephephile lene-metadata lencane.

contact.a: Sifinyelele ku- support@chatforia.com. Faka titfombe tesikrini kanye nenguqulo yakho ye-app.

section2.title: 2) Cala kutfumela imilayeto
section2.item1: Dala iDM noma iGroup bese utfumela umlayeto wakho wekucala.
section2.item2: Sebentisa lihumusho lelisheshako kute ucoce ngetilwimi letingetulu kwa-100.

section3.title: 3) Hamba phambili
section3.item1: Ungatfutfukisa kuhlelo lolukhokhelwako noma nini ngaphakatsi kwe-app.
section3.item2: Uma sewungene ngemvume, ungaxhumanisa lamanye emadivayisi bese usetha ema-backup labhalwe ngekubhala kusuka ku-Settings ku-app.

howItWorks.title: Indlela I-Chatforia Isebenta Ngayo
howItWorks.intro: I-Chatforia yentelwe kwenta kukhulumisana kube melula, kusheshe, futsi kufinyeleleke. Kucala kutsatsa tinyatselo letimbalwa nje.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Bhalisa usebentisa i-imeyili yakho noma ligama lakho lekusebentisa kute wente i-akhawunti yakho ye-Chatforia.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Xhumana nalabanye ngekukhetsa bantfu lococa nabo nobe ucale tingcoco letinsha.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Imilayeto ihanjiswa ngekushesha kute kuniketwe kukhulumisana lokubushelelezi.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Kuhumusha lokwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusita basebentisi kutsi bakhulumisane ngetilwimi letehlukene.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Lawula lokutsandzako, bantfu lococa nabo, kanye netilungiselelo tekuchumana.

safety.title: Imihlahlandlela Yekuphepha & Yemmango
safety.intro: I-Chatforia itimisele ekugcineni indzawo lephephile nalehloniphekile kubo bonkhe basebentisi. Lemihlahlandlela isita kucinisekisa kutsi wonkhe umuntfu utfola lokuhle.
safety.respectDesc: Basebentisi kulindzeleke kutsi bakhulume ngenhlonipho. Kuhlukunyetwa, kuhlukunyetwa, nobe kutiphatsa lokulimatako akukavumeleki.
safety.enforcementDesc: Singatsatsa sinyatselo ngekumelene nema-akhawunti laphula lemihlahlandlela, lokufaka ekhatsi tecwayiso, imikhawulo, nobe kususwa unomphela enkhundleni.

whyMessaging.title: Kungani Emapulatifomu Emilayeto Abaluleke Kakhulu Kunakucala
whyMessaging.intro: Emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto abe ngulelinye lemathulusi labaluleke kakhulu ekukhulumisana emhlabeni wanamuhla. Kusukela etingcocweni temuntfu sicu kuya ekusebentisaneni kwemabhizinisi, tinhlelo tekusebenta temilayeto tivumela bantfu kutsi bahlale bachumene ngekushesha futsi ngendlela lefanele.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Bantfu batsembele kuma-app ekutfumela imilayeto kute bakhulumisane onkhe malanga nebangani, umndeni, kanye nalabo labasebenta nabo. Kungakhatsaliseki kutsi kuyintfo lesheshako nobe ingcoco lendze, kutfumela imilayeto kuniketa indlela lekahle nalegucugucukako yekuhlala uxhumene.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Lomunye wetinzuzo letiyinhloko temapulatifomu emilayeto lijubane lawo. Imilayeto ihanjiswa ngaso leso sikhatsi, kuvumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulumisane ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Lelizinga lekuba lula lente kutsi kutfumela imilayeto kube yindlela lekhetsiwe yekukhulumisana kubantfu labanyenti.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto ahlanganisa bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe. Ngekufinyelela ku-inthanethi, basebentisi bangakhulumisana kungakhatsaliseki kutsi basendzaweni lenjani, kwenta kube lula kwakha budlelwane kanye nekubambisana emaveni emhlaba.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Emapulatifomu emilayeto yesimanje agcila ekuniketeni basebentisi kulawula imininingwane yabo kanye netingcoco tabo. Timphawu letifana nekubhala ngekubhala, emasethingi ebumfihlo, kanye nekulawula imilayeto kuvumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulume ngekwetsembeka.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Imilayeto iyachubeka nekugucuka ngetintfo letinsha letifana netimphendvulo letiniketwa emandla e-AI, kuhumusha, kanye nekwabelana ngetinsita letinyenti. Njengobe tebucwephesha titfutfuka, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto atawuba nemandla kakhulu futsi abe netindlela letinyenti.
whyMessaging.outro: I-Chatforia yakhiwe ngaletimiso engcondvweni, iniketa imilayeto lesheshako, lephephile, nalesebenta kahle yemhlaba loxhumene.

global.title: Likusasa Lekuchumana Kwemhlaba Wonkhe
global.intro: Kukhulumisana sekutfutfuke ngekushesha kuleminyaka lembalwa leyengcile. Loku bekudzingeka kutsi ushaywe lucingo nobe ube nemihlangano yekuhlangana, nyalo sekungentiwa ngekushesha ngekusebentisa emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto. Njengobe tebucwepheshe tichubeka titfutfuka, kukhulumisana kwemhlaba wonkhe kuyashesha, kufinyeleleka futsi kufaka ekhatsi konkhe.
global.barriersDesc: Lolunye lwetingucuko letinkhulu kakhulu tekuchumana kuncishiswa kwetihibe tendzawo. Bantfu nyalo bangakhona kuxhumana nalabanye emhlabeni wonkhe ngesikhatsi lesicishe sibe khona. Kungakhatsaliseki kutsi kukhulunywa ngemuntfu sicu, ngebhizinisi, nobe ngekubambisana, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto enta kutsi libanga libe lincane kakhulu.
global.translationDesc: Lulwimi belusolo lungulesinye setihibe letinkhulu tekuchumana emhlabeni wonkhe. Namuhla, emathulusi ekuhumusha lakhiwe ngaphakathi ayasita kuvala leso sikhala. Emapulatifomu lafana ne-Chatforia avumela basebentisi kutsi bakhulumisane kalula noma ngabe bakhuluma tilwimi letehlukene, kwenta ematfuba lamasha ekuxhumana nekuvisisa.
global.realtimeDesc: Sivinini siyintfo lebalulekile lebumba kuchumana kwalamuhla. Basebentisi balindzele kutsi imilayeto ihanjiswe ngekushesha, futsi sakhiwonchanti sesimanje siyakusekela loko kulindzela. Imilayeto yesikhatsi sangempela yenta kutsi kube netingcoco letimvelo naletimanti.
global.privacyDesc: Njengobe kuchumana sekuba yidijithali kakhulu, kuba mfihlo kanye nekuphepha kuya ngekubaluleka. Basebentisi bafuna kutetsemba kutsi tingcoco tabo tivikelekile. Timphawu letifana nekubhala ngekubhala kanye netilungiselelo letilawulwa ngumsebentisi tisita ekusekeleni sipiliyoni sekuchumana lesiphephile kakhulu.
global.futureDesc: Likusasa lekuchumana emhlabeni wonkhe kungenteka lifake ekhatsi emathulusi lasetulu kakhulu, njengemilayeto lesitwa yi-AI, kuhumusha lokwentiwe ncono, kanye nekusebentisa lokutfutfukisiwe. Njengobe tebucwepheshe titfutfuka, kukhulumisana kutawuchubeka kube yintfo lebonakalako futsi lefinyelelekako.
global.outro: Emapulatifomu lafana ne-Chatforia ayincenye yalokushintja, kusita bantfu kutsi bachumane kalula ngetilwimi kanye nemincele.

index.title: Ibhulogi yeChatforia
index.intro: Hlola lwati ngekuchumana, kuphepha ku-inthanethi, nekutsi bucwepheshe bekutfumela imilayeto buhlanganisa njani bantfu emhlabeni wonkhe.

chatSafely.title: Indlela Yekucoca Ngendlela Lephephile Ku-inthanethi
chatSafely.intro: Kukhulumisana nge-inthanethi kwente kwaba lula kunakucala kuchumana nebantfu emhlabeni wonkhe. Noma ngabe utfumela imilayeto kubangani, uhlangana nebantfu labasha, noma ubambisana ngekwebungcweti, emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto adlala indzima lenkhulu ekuphileni kwamalanga onkhe. Nanobe kunjalo, kuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi kubaluleke kakhulu njengekuhlala uxhumekile.

personalInfo.title: Vikela Lwati Lwakho
personalInfo.body: Lomunye wemitsetfo lebaluleke kakhulu yekuphepha ku-inthanethi kugwema kwabelana ngelulwati lolubucayi loluphatselene nawe. Loku kufaka ekhatsi likheli lakho lasekhaya, imininingwane yetimali, emaphasiwedi, nobe nobe nguyiphi imininingwane lengasetjentiswa kabi. Ngisho nasetincociswaneni letingakabaluleki, kuncono kutsi ukhumbule loko lokucocako nekutsi ucoca nabani.

safetyFeatures.title: Sebentisa Tintfo Tekuphepha Letakhelwe Ngaphakatsi
safetyFeatures.body: Emapulatifomu emilayeto yesimanje njenge-Chatforia aniketa emathuluzi ekusita basebentisi kutsi bahlale baphephile. Tintfo letifana nekuvimba, kubika, kanye nekulawula imfihlo takhiwe kute tinikete basebentisi kulawula lokuhlangenwe nako kwabo. Nangabe umuntfu atiphatsa ngendlela lengakafaneli nobe akwente ungakhululeki, kufanele usebentise lamathulusi ngekushesha.

scams.title: Caphela ngeMikhonyovu
scams.body: Bakhohlisi bavame kusebentisa emapulatifomu ekutfumela imilayeto kute bakhohlise basebentisi kutsi babelane ngelulwati lwabo nobe batfumele imali. Caphela imilayeto lebonakala iyinhle kakhulu kutsi ingaba liciniso, njengetintfo letingalindzelekile, ticelo letiphutfumako nobe tikhonjiso letingakatayeleki. Ngaso sonkhe sikhatsi cinisekisa kutsi umuntfu lokhuluma naye ungubani ngaphambi kwekutsi utsatse sinyatselo.

responsibly.title: Khuluma ngendlela lenesibopho
responsibly.body: Kukhulumisana ngenhlonipho kusita kwenta simondzawo lesiphephile kuwo wonkhe umuntfu. Gwema kucoca nebantfu labalimatako nobe labahlambalatako, futsi ukhumbule kutsi emavi akho angabatsintsa njani labanye. Kusebentisana lokuhle kufaka sandla ekubeni nesipiliyoni lesincono sabo bonkhe basebentisi.

whySafety.title: Kungani Kubalulekile Kuphepha Ku-Inthanethi
whySafety.body: Njengobe kuchumana nge-digital kuchubeka kukhula, kugcina kuphepha nekwetsembana kuya ngekuya kubaluleke kakhulu. Ngekulandzela tindlela tekuphepha letisisekelo kanye nekusebentisa emathulusi lakhonakalako, basebentisi bangajabulela tinzuzo tekutfumela imilayeto ngesikhatsi banciphisa bungoti.

chatSafely.conclusion: Kuhlala uphephile ku-inthanethi akudzingi lwati lolutfutfukile lwebuchwephesha—kumane nje wati, ucaphele, futsi ucaphele kahle. Ngemikhuba lefanele, ungakhuluma ngekwetsembeka futsi ngekuphepha.

about.title: Mayelana neChatforia
about.description: I-Chatforia sitfunywa lesiphephile, lesinetilwimi letinyenti lesinekubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni, kuhumusha lokusheshako, kanye nekushayela ngelivi/ngevidiyo. Umsebenti wetfu ulula: kusita bantfu kutsi bachumane—ngekuphepha, ngasese, nangetilwimi tonkhe.

values.access: Kufinyelela kwabo bonkhe: Kuhumusha ngekuzenzakalela tilwimi letingu-100+.
values.access_aria: Kufinyelela kwabo bonkhe: Humusha ngekuzenzakalela tilwimi letingu-100+.
values.control_aria: Kulawula: Imilayeto lenyamalalako kanye nemarisidi lafundvwako kuyakhetfwa.

about.howDescription: Imilayeto ibhaliwe kudivayisi yakho ngaphambi kwekutsi iphume kuyo. Kuhumusha, kwenta ema- backup kanye nekuvumelanisa idivayisi kwentelwe kunciphisa loko emaseva etfu langakubona.
about.privacyDesc: Kubhala ngekubhala kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni kanye nekulawula kwebumfihlo kwakhiwe ku-Chatforia kusukela ekucaleni.
about.accessDesc: I-Chatforia isita bantfu kutsi bachumane ngetilwimi, emadivayisi, kanye nemincele.
about.controlDesc: Khetsa kutsi imilayeto ivela njani, inyamalala nini, nekutsi i-akhawunti yakho ihlala ivikelekile njani.

press.title: Cindzetela
press.contactLine: Kute utfole imibuto yetindzaba, sitsintsa ku
press.boilerplateBody: I-Chatforia luhlelo lokusebenta lwemilayeto yekucala yebumfihlo lolwenta kutsi ingcoco yetilwimi letiphambukile ingabi nemzamo. Imilayeto ibhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni ngekuzenzakalela, futsi kuhumusha lokwakhelwe ngaphakathi kusekela tilwimi letingu-100+ ngesikhatsi lesifanele. Basebentisi bangavumela imilayeto lenyamalalako, bagcine emarisidi lafundvwako angakhetsa, futsi bavumelanise kuwo onkhe emadivayisi. Itfolakala ku-iOS, ku-Android, naku-web.
press.assetsSubtitle: Emalogo, titfombe tesikrini, kanye netitfombe temkhicito.
press.scanTip: Kudeskithophu? Skena ngefoni yakho kute utfole le-app.

careers.title: Imisebenti
careers.intro: Silicembu lelincane lelisungulako lekwakha i-Chatforia — sitfunywa sangasese, semhlaba wonkhe lesetfulwa kuwebhu, iOS, naku-Android. Nangabe unendzaba nebumfihlo, kubhala, kanye netipiliyoni temsebentisi letijabulisako, singatsandza kuva kuwe.
careers.openRoles: Vula tindzima tekusungulwa: Unjiniyela Loholako Lophelele, Unjiniyela Wemuva (Node.js), Unjiniyela Wekucala/Webhu (React), Unjiniyela Weselula (iOS), Unjiniyela Weselula (i-Android), I-DevOps/SRE, Tekuphepha & Unjiniyela Wekubhala, Unjiniyela Wetekuchumana (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Indlela yekufaka sicelo: Sebentisa lenkinobho lengentansi kute utfumele i-imeyili ye-resume yakho kanye netikhonjiso.
careers.whyBullets:
• Sita ekwakheni sisekelo sesitfunywa lesisha semhlaba wonkhe.
• Kutfumela tintfo letitfutfukisiwe letisetjentiswa kuyo yonkhe iwebhu, iOS, naku-Android.
• Sebenta ngco nemsunguli ngekwakha kanye nekucondzisa umkhicito.
• Tindzawo takho letinemtselela lomkhulu wemfumba: imilayeto, livi, ividiyo, kubhala, telecom, AI.
• Hlanganyela ekucaleni — ngaphambi kwetikali base umsebentisi.

advertise.title: Khangisa nge Chatforia
advertise.description: Finyelela basebentisi bemilayeto labatsintsekako ngekubeka lokunambitsekako, lokuphephile. Siniketa luhlu lwemabhanela etindzaweni letibonakala kakhulu, kuxhaswa, kanye nekukhutsata tindlu. Lababhalisile be-Premium ababoni tikhangiso.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Siphindze futsi sikhonte tintfo letikhona ngekusebentisa i-Google AdSense. Ungacondza iChatforia nge-ID yemshicileli {{pubId}}, noma usebentise lelifomu lelingentasi kute utfole kuxhaswa lokucondzile.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Siphindze futsi sikhonte lokunye lokukhona ngekusebentisa i-Google AdSense. Kukhona kuxhaswa ngalokucondzile—sebentisa lelifomu lelingentasi.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Sicedza luhlu lwetfu lwetikhangiso. Sitjele ngemkhankhaso wakho futsi sitawuncoma kubekwa.

contact.errorSend: Angizange ngikhone kutfumela. Sicela utfumele i-imeyili ekusekelweni@chatforia.com.

intro.body: LeNchubomgomo Yetimfihlo ichaza kutsi i-Chatforia (“tsi”, “tsi”) ibutsela ndzawonye, isebentisa njani, futsi yabelana njani ngelulwati nawusebentisa tinhlelo tetfu tekusebenta kanye netinsita tetfu. Siklama iChatforia kute sinciphise idatha lesingayifinyelela.

infoWeCollect.title: Lwati lesilubutsela ndzawonye
infoWeCollect.account: Lwati lwe-akhawunti (sib., i-imeyili/lucingo) kute wente futsi uvikele i-akhawunti yakho.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Lokucuketfwe lokubhaliwe (imilayeto/tingcingo) kubhaliwe kusuka ekugcineni kuya ekugcineni; angeke sikhone kuyifundza.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Kuhlola/kusebentisa njengemalogi ekushayisana, luhlobo lwedivayisi, noma kuhlatiya lokubi kwenta ncono kusebenta.

sms.title: Tinombolo temakhalekhikhini kanye ne-SMS
sms.body: Nangabe ukhetsa kuniketa inombolo yemakhalekhikhini, siyayisebentisa kute sinikete emandla tintfo letinjengekucinisekisa i-akhawunti, tecwayiso tekungena ngemvume, kanye nekutfumela imilayeto nge-SMS lapho kusekelwa khona. Singatfumela imilayeto ye-SMS yekutsengiselana lephatselene ne-akhawunti yakho kanye nemsebenti ku-Chatforia. Ungakhetsa kungayitfoli imilayeto ye-SMS nobe nini ngekutsi uphendvule ngeligama lelibalulekile lekukhetsa kungayitfoli (njengekutsi “STOP”) nobe ngekutsi ushintje tintfo lotikhetsako tesatiso ku-app. Asiyitsengisi inombolo yakho yelucingo nobe siyisebentisele kutsengisa lokungakaphatselani.
sms.addRecipient: Ngeta umuntfu lowemukelako ngenhla kute ucale...

howWeUse.provide: Niketa futsi uvikele insita (auth, spam/kutfola kuhlukunyetwa).

sharing.title: Kwabelana
sharing.body: Asitsengisi imininingwane yemuntfu sicu. Singahlanganyela idatha lelinganiselwe nebacubunguli (sib., tatiso te-push, kuhlatiya) ngaphansi kwetinkontileka leticinile.

rights.title: Emalungelo akho
rights.body: Kuya ngesigodzi sakho (sib., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), ungacela kufinyelela, kulungisa, kucisha, noma kukhetsa kuphuma ekucubunguleni lokutsite. Kutsintsana na: lingasese@ingcoco.com.

retention.title: Kugcinwa kwemininingwane kanye nekuphepha
retention.body: Sigcina kuphela loko lokudzingekako kute sisebentise lensita futsi sisebentise kuphepha lokusezingeni lemboni. Lokucuketfwe kwe-E2E akukwati kukhishwa ngitsi.

children.title: Bantfwana
children.body: I-Chatforia ayicondziswe kubantfwana labaseminyakeni lengephansi kwalengu-13 (noma njengobe kudzingwa ngumtsetfo wendzawo yakini).

changes.title: Tingucuko
changes.body: Sitawufaka tibuyeketo lapha futsi sibuyekete lusuku lwe “Kugcina kubuyeketwa”.

intro.body: Ngekusebentisa i-Chatforia uvumelana nalemibandzela. Uma ungavumelani, ungayisebentisi lesevisi.

accounts.title: Ema-akhawunti
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Niketa lwati lolunembile futsi ugcine bufakazi buphephile.

acceptableUse.title: Kusetjentiswa lokwemukelekile
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Kute lokucuketfwe lokungekho emtsetfweni, lokuhlukumeta, nobe lokuphula umtsetfo; kute spam noma kuhlukunyetwa lokuzenzakalelayo.

sms.title: Kuchumana nge-SMS
sms.body: Uma uniketa inombolo yelucingo lwaselula, uyavuma kutsi i-Chatforia ingakutfumelela imilayeto ye-SMS lephatselene ne-akhawunti yakho kanye nekusebentisa lesevisi, njengetecwayiso tekungena ngemvume, tatiso tekuphepha, kanye nemilayeto lephatselene netingcoco loticalako nobe lohlanganyela kuto. Umlayeto lojwayelekile kanye nemazinga emininingwane angasebenta. Ungaphuma emilayezweni ye-SMS nobe nini ngekutsi uphendvule ngeligama lelibalulekile lekuphuma lelisekelwako (sibonelo, “YEKA”) nobe ngekutsi uvuselele emasethingi akho esatiso ku-app.

yourContent.title: Lokucuketfwe kwakho
yourContent.body: Ugcina emalungelo kulokucuketfwe kwakho. Usinika emalungelo ladzingekako ekusebentisa lesevisi (sib., kuhamba, kugcina, kuhumusha).

disclaimer.title: Tiphikiso & umtfwalo
disclaimer.body: Inkonzo iniketwa “njengobe injalo” ngaphandle kweticinisekiso. Ngendlela lephelele levunyelwe ngumtsetfo, i-Chatforia ayinasibopho sekulimala lokungacondzi noma lokubangelwa nguloku.

changes.title: Tingucuko
changes.body: Singabuyeketa lemibandzela; kusetjentiswa lokuchubekako ngemuva kwetingucuko kusho kwemukelwa.

refund.title: Inchubomgomo Yekubuyisela Imali
refund.intro: Ku Chatforia, silwela kuniketa insita lesezingeni leliphakeme kubo bonkhe basebentisi. LeNchubomgomo Yekubuyisela Imali ichaza kutsi imali ingakhishwa nini.

subscriptions.title: Kubhalisa
subscriptions.body: Kubhalisa kukhokhiswa kusengaphambili ngendlela lephindzaphindvwako. Ungakhansela nobe nini ngekusebentisa emasethingi e-akhawunti yakho nobe ngeplatifomu lesetjentiselwe kutsenga.

eligibility.title: Kufaneleka Kubuyiselwa Imali
eligibility.body: Kubuyiselwa imali kunganiketwa ngetindleko letiphindvwe kabili, emaphutsa ekukhokha, nobe tindzaba tebuchwepheshe letivimbela kufinyelela etintfweni letikhokhelwako. Tonkhe ticelo tiyabuyeketwa ngesimo ngasinye.

nonRefundable.title: Akubuyiselwa
nonRefundable.body: Ngalokuvamile asikubuyiseli imali yesikhatsi lesingakasetjentiswa, tikhatsi tekubhalisela letiyincenye, nobe kwehluleka kukhansela ngaphambi kwekuvuselela.

thirdParty.title: Kutsengwa kwebantfu besitsatfu
thirdParty.body: Nangabe uthenge ngekusebentisa emapulatifomu ebantfu besitsatfu njenge-Apple App Store, kubuyiselwa imali kufanele kucelwe ngco ngalawo mapulatifomu.

contact.title: Tsintsa
contact.body: • I-Chatforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, eSheridan, eWY 82801, eMelika.

doNotSell.title: Ungatsengisi nobe wabelane ngelwati lwami
doNotSell.body: I-Chatforia ayitsengisi lwati loluphatselene nemuntfu. Bahlali baseCalifornia basakhona kufaka ticelo ngaphansi kwe-CPRA basebentisa lenkinobho lengentansi.

cookies.title: Emasethingi Emakhukhisi
cookies.body: I-Chatforia isebentisa emakhukhi lamancane (sib., seshini, kuphepha). Asisebentisi emakhukhi etikhangiso tebantfu besitsatfu. Lawula emakhukhisi ngekusebentisa emasethingi e-browser yakho.

whatWeSend.title: Loku lesikutfumelako
whatWeSend.body: I-Chatforia itfumela kuphela i-SMS lehambisana ne-akhawunti kanye nekucocisana etinombolweni telucingo umsebentisi latinikete ngalokucacile futsi lavuma kuto. Imilayeto levamile ifaka ekhatsi emakhodi ekungena ngemvume/ekucinisekisa, tecwayiso tekuletsa imilayeto, tatiso tekuphepha, kanye nekubuyeketwa kwe-akhawunti yekutsengiselana.

optIn.title: Indlela basebentisi labakhetsa ngayo
optIn.body: Basebentisi bakhetsa kungena ngekufaka inombolo yabo yelucingo ngesikhatsi sekubhalisa bese bahlola libhokisi lekuhlola lekuvuma nge-SMS ekhasini lekubhalisa nobe lelitinikele .

ios.stay_connected_when_youre_traveling_or_a: Hlala uxhumene nawuhamba nobe ungekho ku-Wi-Fi.
ios.we_dont_sell_data_packs_under_3_gb: Asitsengisi emaphakethe emininingwane ngaphansi kwe-3 GB.
ios.esim_data_packs_require_an_esim_compatib: Emaphakethe emininingwane ye-eSIM adzinga idivayisi lehambisana ne-eSIM futsi lengakhiyiwe.
ios.add_contacts_manually_import_them_from_y: Ngeta bantfu lococa nabo ngesandla, ubangenise efonini yakho, nobe ucale ingcoco lensha.
ios.auto_renewable_subscription_payment_is_c: Kubhalisa lokuvuselelwako. Inkhokhelo ikhokhiswa ku-Akhawunti yakho ye-Apple ngesikhatsi ucinisekisa kutsenga. Kubhalisa kuyavuselelwa ngekuzenzakalela ngaphandle nangabe kukhanseliwe lokungenani emahora langu-24 ngaphambi kwekuphela kwesikhatsi lesikhona. Ungaphatsa futsi ukhansele kubhalisa kwakho kumasethingi e-akhawunti yakho ye-Apple.
ios.best_value_save_almost_36_annually: Inani lelihle kakhulu • Konga cishe 36% ngemnyaka
ios.by_creating_an_account_you_agree_to_our_: Nawudala i-akhawunti, uvumelana neMibandzela Yekusebentisa Nenchubomgomo Yetimfihlo.
ios.chat_with_ria_anytime_separate_from_rand: Coca naRia noma nini — ehlukile kusuka kuhambisana kwebantfu lokungahleliwe.
ios.choose_a_cleaner_more_personal_chatforia: Khetsa i-Chatforia lehlantekile, lephatselene nemuntfu sicu.
ios.choose_a_one_time_esim_data_pack_for_loc: Khetsa iphakheji yedatha ye-eSIM yesikhatsi sinye yekuhlanganiswa kwendzawo, eYurophu, nobe kwemhlaba wonkhe.
ios.create_a_password_protected_backup_of_yo: Dala i-backup levikelwe ngephasiwedi yekhiye yakho yekubhala kute ukwati kubuyisela kufinyelela kudivayisi lensha.
ios.enter_a_3_digit_area_code_us_ca_only_or_: Faka ikhodi yendzawo lenemadijithi lamatsatfu (US/CA kuphela), nobe ushiye lutfo, bese usesha.
ios.enter_the_backup_password_you_created_wh: Faka iphasiwedi yesipele lowayidala ngesikhatsi ugcina ukhiye wakho wekubhala.
ios.forward_incoming_calls_and_texts_to_your: Dlulisela lucingo lolungenako kanye nemibhalo elucingweni lwakho lolucinisekisiwe nobe ku-imeyili. Tingcingo/imibhalo lephumako ingakhombisa inombolo yakho ye-Chatforia.
ios.go_ad_free_with_plus_or_unlock_ai_tools_: Hamba ngaphandle kwesikhangiso nge-Plus, noma uvule emathulusi e-AI kanye nekwentiwa ngekwemvelo nge-Premium.
ios.i_consent_to_receive_sms_messages_from_c: Ngiyavuma kutfola imilayeto ye-SMS levela eChatforia.
ios.install_directly_on_this_iphone_or_use_t: Faka ngco kule iPhone, noma usebentise imininingwane yekusebenta lengentansi kulenye idivayisi lesekelwako.
ios.ria_unavailable_strict_e2ee: Ria ayitholakali ngesikhatsi Strict E2EE inikwe emandla.
ios.ria_took_too_long: Ria watsatsa sikhatsi lesidze kakhulu kutsi aphendvule.
ios.ria_billing_not_set_up: Ria akakatfolakali ngoba kukhokhiswa kwe-AI akukasethwa.
ios.message_globally_translate_instantly_and: Tfumela umlayeto emhlabeni wonkhe, uhumushe ngekushesha, bese ucala tingcoco ngekushesha.
ios.name: Libito
ios.try_different_username_contact_or_phone: Yetama ligama lekusebentisa lelihlukile, ligama lekuchumana, nobe inombolo yelucingo.
ios.search_by_username_contact_or_phone: Sesha ngeligama lemsebentisi, ligama lekuchumana, nobe inombolo yelucingo.
ios.no_active_data_pack_yet_buy_a_pack_below: Kute iphakheji yedatha lesebentako. Thenga iphakheji ngezansi kute ucale kulandzelela kusetjentiswa.
ios.no_backup_found_create_one_to_protect_yo: Kute sipele lesitfolakele. Dala lenye kute uvikele imilayeto yakho.
ios.no_phone_contacts_found: Kute bantfu labatsintsana nabo elucingweni labatfolakele.
ios.no_rewrite_suggestions_came_back_try_ano: Kute tiphakamiso tekubhala kabusha letabuya. Yetama lelinye liphimbo.
ios.please_keep_chatforia_open_while_this_fi: Ngicela nigcine iChatforia ivulekile ngesikhatsi loku kuphelile.
ios.plus_removes_ads_and_adds_forwarding_pre: Plus ususa tikhangiso bese wengeta kudluliselwa. I-Premium ivula tingcikitsi letengetiwe, emathoni emlayeto, emathoni ekukhala, emathuluzi e-AI, kanye nesipiliyoni lesiphelele se-Chatforia.
ios.premium_numbers_are_protected_from_recyc: Tinombolo te-Premium tivikelekile kutsi tingaphindze tisetjentiswe ngesikhatsi kubhalisa kwakho kwe-Premium kusebenta.
